## INSTRUCTIONS
1. Follow the milestones in order
2. Build Milestone 1 first — create all files with the full HTML structure
3. Then apply Milestone 2 — complete CSS styling
4. Then Milestone 3 — all JavaScript functionality
5. Finally Milestone 4 — polish and README
6. After each milestone, confirm completion before moving to the next
7. Replace placeholder content with realistic sample data
8. For the Web3Forms contact form, use `access_key` as a placeholder value — I will replace it with my real key later
